prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-50PC-120-GRIT-8235DD12-AMZ Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): Universal Tool Existing Title: 50pc Universal 1/8 Inch Shank Diamond Burr Bit Set Rotary Tool 120 Grit Description: The 50pc Universal Diamond Burr Set is the ideal accessory for your Dremel or handheld rotary tool. Each set comes with 50 high quality diamond round ball heads in assorted sizes. These burrs can be used for medium material removal by carving, etching, grinding and sanding.

Each burr features a 1/8" shank, and comes in a sturdy compact case for easy transportation and storage while not in use. These are great for working with ceramics, stone, glass, tile, wood, fiberglass, all natural materials and more. Search Terms: wood working glass drill bit tools stone drilling tile Features: - 50pc Set - Designed for use with all rotary tools as well as being compatible for Dremel bit attachments === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Universal Tool 50pc 1/8 Inch Diamond Burr Bit Set

openai.item_name: Universal Tool 50-pc 1/8 in Diamond Burr Bit Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 120 Grit, Rotary Tool Compatible, Dremel Attachment, Stone Glass Wood Ceramic, Compact Storage Case

openai.title_differentiation: 120 Grit, 18" Shank, 50 Piece Assorted Sizes, Rotary Tool Compatible, Compact Storage Case, For Glass Stone Ceramic Tile Wood
